product_overview: A FastAPI backend that generates reusable 'skill' packages from creator content (raw paste, Twitter/X, YouTube) using a CrewAI pipeline, exposing both blocking and SSE streaming endpoints plus listing and export utilities.
core_goals: Provide v1 raw-paste and v2 integrated workflows (Twitter, YouTube) to generate skill packages from creator content.
Expose both synchronous/blocking endpoints and real-time SSE streams to show pipeline progress.
Allow listing, retrieval and export (zip or single file) of generated skills while preventing path traversal and invalid requests.
Return clear validation and error responses for bad inputs and upstream failures.

features.name: Health & Service Info
features.description: Expose service metadata and health check for uptime and documentation discovery.
user_flows: GET /api/health -> Receive 200 with JSON {"status":"ok","service":"Creator Skill Backend","version":"1.0.0"}
GET / -> Receive 200 with service info including workflows and endpoint map
GET /api/health -> Receive 500 Internal server error (service failure)

features.name: Raw Paste Skill Generation
features.description: Generate a skill bundle from pasted creator content (v1 and v2 endpoints).
user_flows: POST /api/v1/generate-skill with body {"creator_content":"(>=40 char content)","desired_skill_name":"My Skill","include_openai_yaml":true} -> Receive 200 GenerateSkillResponse with skill_name, files list and zip path
POST /api/v1/generate-skill with body {"creator_content":"short"} -> Receive 422 Pydantic validation error (string_too_short)
POST /api/v2/generate-skill with body {"creator_content":"(>=40 char content)","desired_skill_name":"My Skill V2"} -> Receive 200 GenerateSkillResponse with source_metadata (if any)

features.name: Raw Paste Skill Generation SSE Stream
features.description: Generate skill from pasted content with real-time SSE events reporting CrewAI pipeline progress.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/generate-skill/stream with body {"creator_content":"(>=40 char content)","desired_skill_name":"Streamed Skill"} -> Receive 200 text/event-stream delivering SSE events: event:crew_start -> event:task_start -> event:step (multiple) -> event:task_done -> event:crew_done -> event:result -> event:done
POST /api/v1/generate-skill/stream with body {"creator_content":"short"} -> Receive 422 Pydantic validation error (string_too_short)
POST /api/v2/generate-skill/stream with body {"creator_content":"(>=40 char content)"} -> Receive 200 text/event-stream with SSE events (v2 semantics)

features.name: Twitter/X Skill Generation
features.description: Fetch a user's tweets and generate a skill package from those tweets (v2).
user_flows: POST /api/v2/generate-skill/twitter with body {"twitter_username":"valid_user","desired_skill_name":"Twitter Skill"} -> Receive 200 GenerateSkillResponse with source_metadata (tweets_count, sample_tweets) and skill artifacts
POST /api/v2/generate-skill/twitter with body {"twitter_username":""} -> Receive 422 Pydantic validation error (twitter_username length 1-15)
POST /api/v2/generate-skill/twitter with body {"twitter_username":"any_user"} when X_BEARER_TOKEN not configured -> Receive 400 with message 'X_BEARER_TOKEN not configured or no tweets found'
POST /api/v2/generate-skill/twitter with body {"twitter_username":"nonexistent"} -> Receive 502 X API upstream error (user not found)

features.name: Twitter/X Skill Generation SSE Stream
features.description: Generate a Twitter-derived skill with real-time SSE events for pipeline visibility.
user_flows: POST /api/v2/generate-skill/twitter/stream with body {"twitter_username":"valid_user"} -> Receive 200 text/event-stream streaming SSE events (crew_start -> task_start -> step -> task_done -> crew_done -> result -> done)
POST /api/v2/generate-skill/twitter/stream with body {"twitter_username":"any_user"} when X_BEARER_TOKEN not configured -> Receive 400 'X_BEARER_TOKEN not configured'
POST /api/v2/generate-skill/twitter/stream with body {"twitter_username":""} -> Receive 422 Pydantic validation error

features.name: YouTube Skill Generation
features.description: Fetch transcripts from one or more YouTube URLs and generate a skill package from the video content (v2).
user_flows: POST /api/v2/generate-skill/youtube with body {"youtube_urls":["https://youtube.com/watch?v=abc123"],"desired_skill_name":"YouTube Skill"} -> Receive 200 GenerateSkillResponse with source_metadata (transcript_sources) and skill artifacts
POST /api/v2/generate-skill/youtube with body {"youtube_urls":[]} -> Receive 422 Pydantic validation error (too_short for empty array)
POST /api/v2/generate-skill/youtube with body {"youtube_urls":["not-a-url"]} -> Receive 400 Invalid YouTube URL or YouTubeError

features.name: YouTube Skill Generation SSE Stream
features.description: Generate YouTube-derived skills with progress reported via SSE stream.
user_flows: POST /api/v2/generate-skill/youtube/stream with body {"youtube_urls":["https://youtube.com/watch?v=abc123"]} -> Receive 200 text/event-stream streaming SSE events (crew_start -> task_start -> step -> task_done -> crew_done -> result -> done)
POST /api/v2/generate-skill/youtube/stream with body {"youtube_urls":["invalid"]} -> Receive 400 Invalid YouTube URL
POST /api/v2/generate-skill/youtube/stream with body {"youtube_urls":[]} -> Receive 422 Pydantic validation error

features.name: Skill Listing & Detail
features.description: List generated skills and retrieve full skill details including file contents; support deletion.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/skills -> Receive 200 with JSON {"skills":[{skill metadata}],"count":N}
GET /api/v1/skills/{skill_name} -> Receive 200 SkillDetail with files array and file contents
GET /api/v1/skills/{missing_skill} -> Receive 404 Skill not found
DELETE /api/v1/skills/{skill_name} -> Receive 200 {"deleted":"skill_name"}
DELETE /api/v1/skills/{missing_skill} -> Receive 404 Skill not found

features.name: Export & Download
features.description: Download generated skills as zip archives or single files; provide raw file content for copy operations.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/export/{skill_name}/zip -> Receive 200 application/zip stream containing the skill archive
GET /api/v1/export/{skill_name}/zip for non-existent zip -> Receive 404 Zip not found
GET /api/v1/export/{skill_name}/{file_path} with valid file_path -> Receive 200 file content with appropriate content-type
GET /api/v1/export/{skill_name}/{file_path} with path containing '..' -> Receive 400 Invalid path (path traversal)
GET /api/v1/export/{skill_name}/{file_path} for missing file -> Receive 404 File not found
POST /api/v1/export/copy with body {"skill_name":"skill1","file_path":"README.md"} -> Receive 200 {"content":"...","file_path":"README.md"}
POST /api/v1/export/copy with body {"skill_name":"skill1","file_path":"../secrets"} -> Receive 400 Invalid path
POST /api/v1/export/copy for missing file -> Receive 404 File not found

features.name: Security - Path Traversal Protection
features.description: Middleware enforces path safety by blocking requests containing '..' to prevent traversal attacks (applies to export and any path parameters).
user_flows: GET /api/v1/export/my_skill/README.md -> Receive 200 file content (middleware allows valid path)
GET /api/v1/export/my_skill/../secrets.txt -> Receive 400 path traversal blocked by middleware
GET /api/v1/skills/..%2Fsecret -> Receive 400 path traversal blocked by middleware

known_limitations.issue: CrewAI pipeline takes 60-120s, exceeding TestSprite 30s tunnel timeout
known_limitations.impact: Generation endpoints cannot be fully tested through TestSprite tunnel

known_limitations.issue: X_BEARER_TOKEN is configured on server, cannot test missing-token path
known_limitations.impact: TC for missing bearer token will always trigger real API call

known_limitations.issue: SSE streaming endpoints return text/event-stream not JSON
known_limitations.impact: Tests must parse SSE format (event + data lines) not standard JSON
